instructions: Review every mapping against Ghidra pseudocode and P-Code.
Replace source_file/source_function with a real source location.
Attach offset, ABI, test, or DTS evidence in evidence.
Set status to reviewed only after an independent review.
Copy a completed file to curated/<driver>/reconstruction_map.json; do not use this template directly.
